ogTitle: Dundowran vs Dundowran Beach: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Dundowran and Dundowran Beach.
heading: Dundowran vs Dundowran Beach — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Dundowran, Queensland and Dundowran Beach, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Dundowran has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Dundowran Beach (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Dundowran or Dundowran Beach safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Dundowran has a flood risk score of 21/100, while Dundowran Beach scores 31/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Dundowran scores 20/100 for bushfire risk. Dundowran Beach scores 40/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Dundowran or Dundowran Beach?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Dundowran has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
